name: [GRIDHAND] Lead Capture Agent - Google Form submit → Airtable row → email follow-up

gridhand.scenario: Google Form submit → Airtable row → email follow-up
gridhand.description: When a customer submits a contact form on a small business's website using Google Forms, it automatically triggers a workflow that creates a new row in the business's Airtable database, storing the customer's inquiry details. Immediately after, an email follow-up is sent to the customer via Gmail, thanking them for their inquiry and providing an estimated response time, all while the business owner receives a notification email to review and respond to the inquiry in a timely manner. By automating this process, the business owner can ensure prompt and personalized follow-ups with potential customers, ultimately leading to increased conversion rates and improved customer satisfaction.
